case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SILVANO CORONA CORONA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, SILVANO CORONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY SATISFIED AS OF 08/10/2020. AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, SILVANO CORONA
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, SILVANO CORONA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SILVANO CORONA CORONA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORONA, SILVANO CORONA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, SILVANO CORONA

FILED RETURN TO COURT WRIT RETURN - WRIT PARTIALLY SATISIFIED - SATISFACTION AMOUNT: $2,677.00. PER SAN MATEO SHERIFF'S DEPT, "RELEASED BY CREDITOR; AMENDED WRIT RETURNED PER CCP 699.50; PARTIALLY SATISFIED. ORIGINAL WRIT RETURNED TO COURT ON 7/14/20; FILE CLOSED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,665.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, SILVANO CORONA
